DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT AND VIOLATION OF CC 1632 FOR PLAINTIFFS TO ALLEGE IN GOOD FAITH FACTS IN SUPPORT OF EACH ELEMENT OF THESE CAUSES OF ACTION AND TO ATTACH CONTRACT (OR QUITE THEM VERBATIM IN THE COMPLAINT). DEMURRER IS OTHERWISE SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND, NON-OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. Motion For Judgment Of Dismissal With Prejudice
Off Calendar Feb-03-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Marshall J. Hogan; Snell & Milmer LLP; 714-427-7000; appearing via Zoom on behalf of defendants PS Funding, Inc, Peer Street, Inc., and FCI Lender Services, Inc.
Timothy Kelly; 707-570-7507; appearing via CourtCall on behalf of plaintiffs Insun Son, Ted Carroll, and Pacific Heights Premier Investments, LLC.

Not contested. During roll call, plaintiff's counsel stated they were appearing to oppose defendants' motion, but that he did not see the court's tentative ruling, nor give notice to opposing counsel that he would be contesting the court's tentative ruling. When the case was called, plaintiff's counsel did not state an appearance and was not heard from. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS PS FUNDING INC., FCI LENDER SERVICES, INC., AND PEER STREET, INC.'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT OF DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

Prevailing party to prepare order in conformity with the ruling of the court. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-20-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
(707-570-7507) Timothy S. Kelly, Esq., via CourtCall for Plaintiff, Insun Son
Marshall Hogan, Esq. via Zoom for Defendant, Dorian Peecher.

Hearing held. The Court stated that no formal notice was provided to the defendant and the only option that the Court has is to adopt the tentative ruling. Mr. Hogan stated his support of the tentative ruling. Mr. Kelly reported that he intended to give notice sooner.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT PS FUNDING INC., FCI LENDER SERVICES, INC, PEER STREET, INC. DEMURRER to 2ND Amended COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not Reported. (D501)
